backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including hero section, ticket CTA, festival highlights, experience zones, schedule, participation forms, and closing section with high confidence mappings to test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing the KathaLok festival webpage components, styling, and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, defining heritage-inspired color palette and design tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the KathaLok application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that orchestrates the full-page layout by rendering all major sections (hero, CTA, highlights, zones, schedule, participation, closing) in sequence.
frontend/src/components/ClosingSection.t: Footer component displaying mission statement, partner organization logos (Ministry of Culture, IGNCA, ASI, NSD), social links, contact information, and Caffeine attribution.
Interactive grid of 6 experience zone cards (Ayurveda, Attar, Games, Brahmi Script, Literature, Food) with hover effects, image overlays, and responsive layout.
frontend/src/components/FestivalHighligh: Grid section displaying 8 event type cards with icons, titles, and descriptions covering talks, performances, book launches, and theatrical productions with hover animations.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with background image, gradient overlay, headline "SamayYaan presents KathaLok", subheadline, tagline, and smooth-scroll CTA button.
frontend/src/components/ParticipateSecti: React component rendering a participation section with two forms: one for general participation (performer/volunteer/attendee) and one for newsletter subscription, both with validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Schedule.tsx: React component displaying a three-day event schedule with category filtering (Talks, Music, Theatre, Zones) and tabbed navigation for each day, showing time, title, category, and venue for each event.
frontend/src/components/TicketCTA.tsx: Call-to-action component displaying event details (March 15-17, 2026 at IGNCA, New Delhi) with a prominent ticket booking button and early bird discount information.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages ICP backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, automatically invalidating and refetching dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file indicating no backend data operations are needed as all content is static and client-side rendered.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind configuration, custom color palette (saffron, maroon, ivory, gold, forest) with light/dark modes, font imports (Playfair Display, Lato), and background pattern utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, custom fonts (Playfair Display, Lato), border radius variables, and animation keyframes for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project state file defining a React + TypeScript cultural festival website for 'KathaLok' with heritage-inspired design, warm earth tones, and classical Indian motifs. Contains architectural notes, image requirements for hero backgrounds, event icons, experience zone cards, partner logos, and decorative patterns, plus tracking of existing features and implementation status.
